title: Gamer trades in $1,000 of physical discs at GameStop, days after Sony announces end of disc era
summary: A Columbus gamer traded in $1,000 worth of physical game discs at GameStop shortly after Sony announced the end of the disc era for PlayStation. The transaction underscores how manufacturers' strategic shifts can trigger immediate market movements in used game sales, with consumers divided between liquidating collections and hoarding physical media.
content: While some collectors may plan to hoard their physical media, one Columbus gamer decided to liquidate his collection

zh.title: 玩家在GameStop交易价值1000美元实体游戏光盘，索尼宣布光盘时代结束数天后
zh.summary: 一名来自哥伦布的玩家在索尼宣布PlayStation光盘时代结束后不久，在GameStop交易了价值1000美元的实体游戏光盘。这笔交易凸显了制造商的战略转变如何能立即引发二手游戏市场的波动，消费者在清空藏品和囤积实体媒体之间摇摆不定。

title: Why a founder at age 50 is twice as likely to find success as one at age 30
summary: Entrepreneurs over age 50 are substantially more successful at founding companies than younger founders, defying age discrimination stereotypes. This trend reflects how mature workers are combating ageism by launching their own businesses and outperforming younger counterparts.
content: Older workers are fighting ageism by starting their own businesses — and they’re outperforming younger entrepreneurs

zh.title: 为什么50岁的创业者成功的可能性是30岁创业者的两倍
zh.summary: 50岁以上的企业家创办公司的成功率远高于年轻创业者,这颠覆了年龄歧视的刻板印象。这一趋势反映了成熟的工作者通过创办自己的企业来对抗年龄歧视,并超越年轻对手的现象。

title: Why June’s jobs and inflation data are bullish for bonds
summary: Recent June jobs and inflation data suggest favorable conditions for bond markets, with the employment report showing weakness that exceeds initial market perceptions. The softer-than-expected job growth could support bond valuations and attract fixed-income investors seeking safer assets. Economic weakness in the labor market typically benefits bond prices as investors reassess interest rate expectations.
content: The new jobs report is worse than many people realize.

zh.title: 为什么6月的就业和通胀数据对债券有利
zh.summary: 最近的6月就业和通胀数据表明债券市场条件有利，就业报告显示的疲弱程度超过了初期市场预期。低于预期的就业增长可能支持债券估值并吸引寻求更安全资产的固定收益投资者。劳动力市场的经济疲弱通常会使债券价格受益，因为投资者重新评估利率预期。

title: Insurers shifted roof-replacement costs onto homeowners thanks to a new federal rule — just in time for hail and hurricane season
summary: A new federal rule has shifted roof-replacement costs from insurance companies to homeowners, creating a financial dilemma during severe weather season. Homeowners facing major roof damage must now choose between filing claims that could increase premiums or paying out-of-pocket for repairs.
content: Those who find extensive damage to their roofs might be stuck between two options: File an insurance claim, which could trigger a premium increase, or cough up the cash for the necessary repairs or replacement.

zh.title: 保险公司因新的联邦规则将屋顶更换成本转移到房主身上——恰逢冰雹和飓风季节
zh.summary: 一项新的联邦规则将屋顶更换成本从保险公司转移到房主身上,在严重天气季节造成财务困境。面临重大屋顶损坏的房主现在必须在提交可能增加保费的理赔或自掏腰包修缮之间做出选择。

title: Where can I invest my kid’s ‘Trump account’ money? The Treasury Department just answered that question.
summary: The Treasury Department has clarified investment rules for "Trump accounts," specifying that funds must be placed in low-cost index funds. This guidance helps parents and investors understand which specific funds meet the requirements for these accounts.
content: The money in “Trump accounts” has to be invested in low-cost index funds — and now parents and investors are learning which funds they can actually use.

zh.title: 我可以在哪里投资孩子的"特朗普账户"资金?财政部刚刚回答了这个问题
zh.summary: 财政部澄清了"特朗普账户"的投资规则,规定资金必须投入低成本指数基金。这一指导帮助父母和投资者了解哪些特定基金符合这些账户的要求。

title: Jelly Roll’s ex-wife Bunnie Xo says he gave her their $6 million Tennessee estate in divorce
summary: Bunnie Xo, ex-wife of country singer Jelly Roll, will receive full ownership of their $6 million Tennessee estate as part of their divorce settlement. The high-profile settlement highlights the division of valuable assets in celebrity divorces.
content: Country singer Jelly Roll’s ex-wife, Bunnie Xo, has revealed that she will take full ownership of the former couple’s Tennessee compound as part of their divorce settlement.

zh.title: Jelly Roll的前妻Bunnie Xo称他在离婚中将价值600万美元的田纳西州庄园赠予她
zh.summary: 乡村歌手Jelly Roll的前妻Bunnie Xo将在离婚协议中获得他们价值600万美元的田纳西州地产的完全所有权。这项引人注目的和解突显了名人离婚中有价值资产的分割。

title: I have no kids. Will I cause family drama by leaving different amounts to my nieces and nephews?
summary: A childless individual seeks advice on estate distribution among nieces and nephews, concerned about potential family conflict despite unequal allocations. They consider directing larger amounts to relatives who would experience greater financial impact from the inheritance. The dilemma reflects broader questions about equitable estate planning practices and balancing generosity with family dynamics.
content: “Part of me would prefer to leave more to those for whom the money could make a meaningful difference.”

zh.title: 我没有孩子。给侄女侄子留下不同数额的遗产会引发家庭矛盾吗？
zh.summary: 一位无子女的人就如何在侄女侄子之间分配遗产寻求建议，担心尽管分配不均，可能会引发家庭冲突。他们考虑将更多资金指向能从遗产中获得更大经济收益的亲属。这个困境反映了关于公平遗产规划实践以及平衡慷慨与家庭关系的更广泛问题。

title: Erdogan's warm ties with Trump offer Turkey an edge ahead of NATO summit
summary: Turkish President Erdogan's close relationship with Trump positions Turkey advantageously as NATO prepares for an upcoming summit. Trump's documented preference for authoritarian leaders has strengthened Turkey's diplomatic position within NATO discussions.
content: Trump's affinity for strongmen leaders made him an admirer of Erdogan, who amassed power in Turkey as its prime minister and in his 13th year as president.

zh.title: 埃尔多安与特朗普的紧密关系为土耳其在北约峰会前提供竞争优势
zh.summary: 土耳其总统埃尔多安与特朗普的密切关系使土耳其在北约准备召开峰会时处于有利位置。特朗普对威权领导人的明确偏好加强了土耳其在北约讨论中的外交立场。

title: When it comes to beating the stock market, no news really is good news
summary: A study reveals people misinterpret financial news headlines, suggesting that ignoring market headlines may be a better strategy for beating the stock market.
content: A new study has found a flaw in how people interpret the very headlines they are seeing.

zh.title: 当涉及到战胜股市时,没有新闻才是好消息
zh.summary: 一项研究揭示人们误解金融新闻标题,表明忽视市场新闻标题可能是战胜股市的更好策略。

title: I've worked with over 5,000 kids: I swear by this No. 1 parenting rule—it's 'surprisingly simple'
summary: A child development expert with 5,000+ families' experience identifies a common communication mistake parents make daily and offers guidance on setting boundaries and asking effective questions.
content: Child development expert Siggie Cohen, who has worked with over 5,000 families, shares one communication mistake she sees parents make every day. Here's why she says it can backfire, when to set clear boundaries and how to use questions more effectively.

zh.title: 我和超过5000个孩子一起工作过:我坚持这条第一育儿法则——它"惊人地简单"
zh.summary: 一位有超过5000个家庭经验的儿童发展专家确定了父母每天犯的一个常见沟通错误,并提供了关于设定边界和提出有效问题的指导。

title: BTIG names an athleisure company, cybersecurity stock and more as its top picks for the second half of 2026
summary: Investment firm BTIG identified 55 stocks spanning large and small caps, including athleisure and cybersecurity companies, as top picks for strong performance in the second half of 2026.
content: The firm named 55 large- and small-cap stocks that it thinks are set to perform well in the next six months.

zh.title: BTIG将运动休闲公司、网络安全股票等列为2026年下半年的首选
zh.summary: 投资公司BTIG确定了55只股票,涵盖大小股,包括运动休闲和网络安全公司,作为2026年下半年强劲表现的首选。

title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
summary: The World Cup event triggered record-breaking trading volumes across prediction market platforms, with Kalshi and Polymarket hitting new highs and Rothera handling $2 billion in volume.
content: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.

zh.title: 世界杯推动预测市场交易量创新高
zh.summary: 世界杯事件引发预测市场平台交易量创历史新高，Kalshi和Polymarket达到新峰值，Rothera处理了20亿美元的交易量。

title: Trump to mark U.S. 250th anniversary with campaign-style rally on National Mall
summary: Trump is holding a campaign-style rally on the National Mall for the U.S. 250th anniversary, with attendees facing heightened security, potential storms, and extreme heat exceeding 100°F.
content: Washington's July 4 celebration attendees this year will have to contend with stepped-up ‌security, possible thunderstorms and temperatures that could top 100F.

zh.title: 特朗普在国家广场举办竞选集会庆祝美国250周年纪念日
zh.summary: 特朗普在国家广场为美国250周年纪念日举办竞选风格的集会，参加者面临加强安保、潜在风暴和超过100华氏度的极端高温。

title: Pope Leo urges U.S. to welcome immigrants in July 4 appeal
summary: Pope Leo called for U.S. immigration welcome in a July 4 statement, continuing his criticism of hardline anti-immigration policies he had previously called inhumane.
content: Leo drew the ire of Donald Trump last year after calling the U.S. president's hardline anti-immigration policies inhumane.

zh.title: 教宗利奥在7月4日呼吁美国欢迎移民
zh.summary: 教宗利奥在7月4日声明中呼吁美国欢迎移民，继续批评他之前称为不人道的强硬反移民政策。

title: Keiko Fujimori declared winner of Peru presidential race
summary: Keiko Fujimori won Peru's presidential election and will become the nation's 10th president since 2016 when she assumes office on July 28.
content: When Fujimori assumes power on July 28, she will be Peru's 10th president since 2016.

zh.title: 藤森慶子被宣布為秘魯總統選舉贏家
zh.summary: 藤森慶子贏得秘魯總統選舉，將在7月28日就職成為該國自2016年以來的第10位總統。

title: Trump hails U.S. exceptionalism before veering into darkly political speech to usher in America's 250th anniversary
summary: Trump delivered a speech celebrating U.S. exceptionalism before shifting to a politically charged tone at an Independence Day eve event marked by severe heat across the eastern United States.
content: The president's speech capped an Independence Day eve otherwise most notable for a brutal heat wave that gripped much of the eastern part of the country.

zh.title: 特朗普讚揚美國例外主義，隨後在美國建國250週年前夜活動中發表充滿政治色彩的演講
zh.summary: 特朗普在獨立日前夜活動中發表演講讚揚美國例外主義，隨後轉向政治色彩濃厚的言論，該活動期間美國東部遭遇嚴重高溫。

title: UK and France agree with Oman to ensure safety of its territorial waters
summary: The UK and France reached an agreement with Oman to protect its territorial waters, with France deploying mine countermeasure operations including specialized mine-hunting vessels.
content: France said it has deployed mine countermeasures to the Middle East, including two mine-hunting ships.

zh.title: 英國和法國與阿曼達成協議確保其領海安全
zh.summary: 英國和法國與阿曼達成協議以保護其領海，法國部署了包括專門掃雷船隻在內的掃雷行動。

title: From Macron to Modi, governments are rolling out the red carpet for AI giants
summary: France and India are actively courting major tech CEOs to attract investment in AI data centers and cloud infrastructure, highlighting governments' competitive race for AI dominance.
content: Macron and Modi are courting tech CEOs as France and India seek AI data center investment and cloud infrastructure.

zh.title: 从马克龙到莫迪，各国政府为AI巨头敞开大门
zh.summary: 法国和印度正积极争取主要科技公司CEO投资AI数据中心和云基础设施，突显各国争夺AI主导地位的激烈竞争。

title: 'Just married': Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce tie the knot
summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have married, with comedian Adam Sandler officiating the ceremony according to a publicist's statement. The union brings together pop music's biggest star and the NFL player, merging the entertainment and sports worlds.
content: Comedian Adam Sandler officiated the ceremony, said the publicist's statement under the headline "Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Are Married!"

zh.title: "刚结婚":泰勒·斯威夫特和特拉维斯·凯尔斯喜结连理
zh.summary: 泰勒·斯威夫特和特拉维斯·凯尔斯已结婚，据发言人声明，喜剧演员亚当·桑德勒主持了婚礼。这场婚姻将流行音乐巨星和美式足球运动员联系在一起，融合了娱乐和体育世界。

title: Iran begins six-day funeral for Ayatollah Khamenei nearly four months after his death
summary: Iran will hold a six-day funeral ceremony for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, nearly four months after his death, with services spanning both Iran and Iraq before burial in Mashhad. The extended funeral reflects his significant role in Iranian politics and religion.
content: Iran plans a six-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, with ceremonies across Iran and Iraq before burial in Mashhad.

zh.title: 伊朗为阿亚图拉·哈梅内伊举行六天葬礼，距其去世已近四个月
zh.summary: 伊朗将为最高领袖阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊举行六天葬礼，这距他去世已近四个月，葬礼仪式将在伊朗和伊拉克进行，最后在马什哈德下葬。这次长期葬礼反映了他在伊朗政治和宗教中的重要角色。

title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100M New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
summary: A federal prosecutor is seeking a reduced prison sentence for James Patten, one of three defendants in a stock manipulation scheme involving Hometown International, a company that operated a single New Jersey deli. The request involves undisclosed reasons, drawing attention to potential insider trading tactics. This case highlights how market fraud can involve unusual vehicles like a small, single-location business.
content: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.

zh.title: 美国联邦政府为新泽西州1亿美元熟食店欺诈犯寻求减刑——但部分原因隐而未宣
zh.summary: 联邦检察官正为詹姆斯·帕滕寻求减刑，他是涉及家乡国际公司（一家经营单一新泽西州熟食店的公司）股票操纵计划的三名被告之一。该请求涉及未公开的原因，引发了对潜在内幕交易策略的关注。这个案例突出了市场欺诈如何可能涉及小型单一地点企业等不同寻常的手段。
